name: guardian-swarn
description: A portable multi-agent skills repository for security, architecture, AST analysis, and QA workflows in Claude Code and similar agent hosts.

commands.name: guardian-audit
commands.description: Run the full Guardian Swarm multi-agent audit workflow.

commands.name: guardian-secure
commands.description: Run the targeted security and dependency review workflow.

commands.name: guardian-clean
commands.description: Run the cleanup workflow for smells, dead code, and minor refactors.

commands.name: guardian-deep-scan
commands.description: Run the deep AST and call-graph analysis workflow.
